title: Insider-transaction / global-news point-in-time feature source (B0015 alt-data family)
source: Analysis of D:\PROJECTS\TradingAgents-main (Tauric Research multi-agent LLM trading framework) for transferable patterns, 2026-05-27. Most of it is LLM-as-trader (forbidden by our rule-based-primary contract + lookahead firewall), but three engineering patterns transfer.
why: TradingAgents' dataflows layer exposes alt-data tools we have not tried: get_insider_transactions, get_global_news, and structured fundamentals. The reusable angle is the DATA SOURCES as point-in-time feature inputs (or single-condition primaries) — fed through our existing .shift(1) publication-lag discipline into build_tier2_features — NOT the LLM that consumes them. Insider-transaction flow in particular is a clean point-in-time signal absent from our current feature set. This continues the B0015 alt-data lever; our prior memo concluded single-condition primaries beat the COT+DXY AND-gate (B0015b pre-flight falsified), so insider/news flow should be tried as single-condition signals.
value_rationale: M: plausible orthogonal edge and fits the existing alt-data program, but sourcing/PIT alignment cost is real and equities-oriented data (insider txns) needs an XAU/FX-relevant analogue before it pays off here.
scope: Survey which TradingAgents alt-data tools have an XAU/FX-relevant analogue (insider txns are equities-only; global-news + macro-event flow are more transferable).
Spec a point-in-time ingestion contract for the chosen source (publication timestamp, frequency-aware lag — note .shift(1) is daily-calendar and wrong for H4, see B0050 H3).
Prototype as a single-condition primary and/or tier2 feature; run the standard triple-barrier + purge/embargo backtest.
Leak-injection test on the PIT alignment before any audit.
recommendation: Prioritize macro/global-news + event flow over insider transactions for the XAU/FX scope.
out_of_scope: Using the alt-data via an LLM trader; multi-condition AND-gated primaries (B0015b lesson).
